user.title: Inkbird IM-03-W Configuration
user.description:
Enter credentials and settings to connect to the Tuya IoT Portal.

You need to extract the Cookie and CSRF token from your browser's DevTools (Network tab) after logging into the Tuya IoT Portal.

reauth.title: Reauthenticate Inkbird IM-03-W
reauth.description:
Your authentication to the Tuya IoT Portal has expired. Please provide new Cookie and CSRF token from the Tuya Portal DevTools.

Device: {device_id}

error.invalid_auth: Invalid Cookie or CSRF token. Please verify your credentials.
